rows.notes: Title line at top of page. Very clear handwriting and no amounts present; vertical ruling lines used later for alignment.
Date line directly under title. Text legible and contains no monetary figures.
Section heading introducing receipts. Clear word and no amounts on this line.

Description spelling slightly uncertain (handwritten) but clearly the first receipt item. Amount columns aligned to right ruling lines: 870£, 9s, 6d with a trailing loop interpreted as 3/4 (three farthings). Numbers validate (s 0-19, d 0-11 with fraction).
Second receipt item. Text 'Anni presentis' read clearly. Amount aligned in the same £/s/d columns: 204£ 1s 2d, no fraction marker visible.
Third receipt item 'Varia' clearly legible. Amount reading 1931£ 1s 8d aligns with column lines; pence digit clear.

Underlined subtotal of the three receipt lines. Number alignment is clear and the fractional pence (3/4) is visible. Verified by summing the three items above (870+204+1931 = 3005; pence/shilling carry confirmed).
Debt of preceding year. Wording legible. Amount reads 608£ 12s 3d with a clear halfpenny symbol (interpreted as 1/2). Column alignment consistent with other rows.

Total (combined receipts + prior debts). Underlined and aligns with columns. Verified by arithmetic: 3005£12s4 3/4d + 608£12s3 1/2d = 3614£4s8 1/4d (carries applied); fractional quarter (1/4) is visible and matches calculation.
Section heading for payments ('Soluta'). Clear and contains no amounts on this line.
Payment to rector/scholars line. Description read as 'Pro Rectori Scholaribus &c.' Amount 714£ 14s 10d aligned to £/s/d columns; digits legible.
Payment 'Ordinaria' clearly legible. Amount reads 616£ 9s 3d; digits and alignment clear.

Third payment 'Varia' is written, but the pounds figure is less clearly spaced in the handwriting. The visible subtotal (next underlined line) forces this line to be 1212£ 12s 0d to reconcile: 714£14s10d + 616£9s3d + X = 2543£16s1d → X = 1212£12s0d. Pounds digits are partially smudged/close together; pence appears to be blank (interpreted as 0) to satisfy the subtotal arithmetic.
Underlined subtotal for Soluta. Amount 2543£16s1d is clearly written and aligns with columns; used to infer the ambiguous Varia line above.
Label 'Ex receptis' with amount equal to the earlier combined total of receipts and prior debts (3614£4s8 1/4d). Clear handwriting and aligns with the same £/s/d columns. Fraction 1/4 visible.
Label indicates payments deducted; amount 2543£16s1d matches the Soluta subtotal. Clear alignment and digits legible; no fractional pence visible on this line.

Final balance 'Restat Solvendum' underlined. Amount 1070£8s7 1/4d is clearly written and arithmetically consistent: 3614£4s8 1/4d - 2543£16s1d = 1070£8s7 1/4d (carries checked). Fractional quarter clearly visible.
Confirmation heading above signatures. Clear Latin phrase and no amounts present.
First signature line. Name and title read as 'J. L. Richards Rectorum' though signature flourishes reduce legibility slightly; no monetary data.

Second signature; handwriting is cursive and somewhat ambiguous. Interpreted as 'Georgium Rawlinson Subrectorem' (given common Latinized signature forms), but several letters are uncertain (hence moderate confidence). No amounts.

Third signature line faint and tightly written; read as 'Joannem Ley S T B Bursar Suo' based on letter shapes and typical titulature. Several characters are unclear (low confidence). No monetary figures.
Signature read as 'Gulielmum Woollcombe Socium' (Latinized W. Woollcombe). Handwriting moderately clear for this line; no amounts present.
Signature appears to read 'Gulielmum Andrews Decanum' (Latinized William Andrews, Dean). Some letters ambiguous but overall plausible given context and spacing; no monetary data.
Final signature line partly faded/ornate; interpreted as 'Joannem Brande Morris Socium' though the surname and middle letters are uncertain. No amounts on this line.
